Entities.Name: AgentFeedback
Entities.Description: Manager feedback and performance ratings logged against a call center agent.

Entities.Name: Agents
Entities.Description: Call center agents who handle customer calls.

Entities.Name: AiUsage
Entities.Description: Singleton usage tracker for AI Q&A calls. Only one record (record_key = singleton) should exist.

Fields.Name: record_key
Fields.Description: Fixed key enforcing the singleton-row pattern. Always singleton.

Fields.Name: calls_today
Fields.Description: Gemini calls made today; reset daily by the app.

Fields.Name: period_date
Fields.Description: The date that calls_today is counted against.

Fields.Name: last_model
Fields.Description: Model name of the most recent AI call.

Fields.Name: last_endpoint
Fields.Description: Endpoint name of the most recent AI call.

Entities.Name: CallFollowup
Entities.Description: Post-call action items with approval, assignment, and completion tracking.

Fields.Name: call_record
Fields.Description: Native Data Fabric relationship to the parent CallRecord.

Fields.Name: reason
Fields.Description: Transcript snippet explaining why this follow-up was generated.

Fields.Name: assigned_to
Fields.Description: Name of the person responsible for the action.

Fields.Name: approved_by
Fields.Description: Supervisor who approved or rejected the item.

Fields.Name: completion_notes
Fields.Description: Notes added when marking the item complete.

Entities.Name: CallRecord
Entities.Description: Core call transcript and AI-extracted analytics data for the Acme call center.

Fields.Name: callid
Fields.Description: Unique 8-digit call identifier from the telephony system.

Fields.Name: agent_name
Fields.Description: Handling agent (Sam, John, David, Mike, Mary).

Fields.Name: escalation_flag
Fields.Description: Yes = call was escalated to supervisor.

Fields.Name: compliance_flag
Fields.Description: Yes = PASSED MAS protocol. No = FAILED.

Fields.Name: call_resolved_flag
Fields.Description: Yes = customer issue resolved during the call.

Fields.Name: preverified_flag
Fields.Description: Yes = caller identity pre-verified before disclosure.

Fields.Name: triggerword_flag
Fields.Description: Yes = high-risk trigger words detected in transcript.

Fields.Name: repeatcall_flag
Fields.Description: Yes = customer called again recently for the same issue.

Fields.Name: transcript
Fields.Description: Complete raw transcript text with speaker labels.

Entities.Name: SystemUser
Entities.Description: Contains Automation Cloud users and groups that have ever had roles assigned, or accessed Data Service
